x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Custom business rules on alert and event tables can conflict with Now Assist TSOM AI correlation actions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_script");gr.addQuery("collection","em_alert");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.addEncodedQuery("sys_created_byNOT INglide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy");gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n<=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" custom BRs on em_alert",finding:"TSOM customization risk: "+n+" custom BRs. "+(n>10?"High customization increases conflict risk with Now Assist TSOM AI correlation.":"Risk within acceptable range.")};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review custom BRs on em_alert. Test with Now Assist TSOM enabled in sub-production.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ce5
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Custom business rules on alert and event tables can conflict with Now Assist TSOM AI correlation actions.]]></ai_justification><check_name>TSOM Customization Risk</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_script");gr.addQuery("collection","em_alert");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.addEncodedQuery("sys_created_byNOT INglide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy");gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n<=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" custom BRs on em_alert",finding:"TSOM customization risk: "+n+" custom BRs. "+(n>10?"High customization increases conflict risk with Now Assist TSOM AI correlation.":"Risk within acceptable range.")};})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>AIOPS</module><number>CHK0000453</number><order>110</order><remediation_guidance>Review custom BRs on em_alert. Test with Now Assist TSOM enabled in sub-production.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>8bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ce5</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>TSOM Customization Risk</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_8bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ce5</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
